codeReview.summary: Fix (626f41b) properly addresses all 3 blocking issues from the prior review. TaskResult now includes category/difficulty fields, compute_by_category() and compute_by_difficulty() use actual values from results, and filtered_tasks() now checks difficulty_filter. All TaskResult constructors (success, failed, skipped) updated to require category/difficulty. Tests updated accordingly.

summary: Fix adequately addresses the original failure. The original feature (commit 1361729) created a functional benchmark crate with 50 tasks, but had 3 blocking bugs in metrics aggregation where category/difficulty were always 'unknown'. The fix (commit 626f41b) adds category/difficulty fields to TaskResult, updates all aggregation functions to use actual values, and adds difficulty_filter check to filtered_tasks(). All tests pass.
